researchSources: BizNews.com - Charlie Munger's Harvard School speech transcript (June 1986)

masterResearchSchedule.talkTitle: A Lesson on Elementary, Worldly Wisdom as It Relates to Investment Management and Business
researchSources: Farnam Street (fs.blog) - Complete transcript of 1994 USC Business School talk
Safal Niveshak - PDF collection of Munger talks
masterResearchSchedule.notes: Comprehensive master notes covering 17 major mental models including latticework of mental models, man with a hammer syndrome, psychology of misjudgment, advantages and disadvantages of scale, circle of competence, pari-mutuel betting analogy, and surfing model. Includes 10+ case studies (Wal-Mart vs. Sears, CBS/Paley, NCR/Patterson, Berkshire textiles, etc.) and practical applications for personal development, business analysis, and investing.
